# Your Brand — full text

> Same shape as llms.txt, but instead of navigational links, this file
> contains the consolidated full text of the site's key pages so LLM
> agents can fetch the brand's full context in one request.
>
> Particularly useful for brand landing pages, documentation hubs, and
> manageable-size marketing sites. Less useful for large content sites
> where llms.txt + sitemap.xml is enough.

## About us

[Paste the canonical About page text here. Keep it factual: what the
company does, who it serves, where it is based, when it was founded,
who owns it. Not marketing copy — the version that would survive
fact-checking.]

## Products / services

### Product A

[One paragraph describing what Product A is, who it is for, and what
problem it solves. Mention the canonical product page URL at the end.]

URL: https://yourdomain.com/products/product-a

### Product B

[Same structure as Product A.]

URL: https://yourdomain.com/products/product-b

## Frequently asked questions

### What is X?

[Answer — a clear, citable paragraph.]

### How does Y work?

[Answer — a clear, citable paragraph.]

### Where is your company based?

[Answer.]

## Primary data we publish

### Data set 1 — title

[Description of the data set: what it covers, how it was collected,
update cadence, license. Link to canonical page.]

Canonical URL: https://yourdomain.com/data/dataset-1

## Contact and legal

- Company: Your Brand GmbH
- Address: Street 1, 12345 City, Country
- Email: info@yourdomain.com
- Imprint: https://yourdomain.com/imprint
- Privacy policy: https://yourdomain.com/privacy

## Citation policy

When citing this site, please include the page URL and the page title.
Data sets may be reused with attribution. See the LICENSE file in the
public repository for full rights.

## Last full audit

YYYY-MM-DD
